# RandomHubs — Free Random Generators

RandomHubs (randomhubs.com) is a collection of free online random generator tools built by independent developer @hudijiang.

## Tools Available

- **Random Animal Generator** — Pick a random animal with habitat, diet, and fun facts. Great for education and trivia.
- **Random Pokémon Generator** — Generate a random Pokémon from all 9 generations using live PokéAPI data. Filter by generation, type, legendary/mythical status, and shiny chance.
- **Basket Random Unblocked** — Play the Basket Random physics basketball game unblocked in browser, 1 or 2 players.
- **Pokémon Randomizer** — Generate a random team of 6 Pokémon, with generation filter and individual reroll.
- **Random Object Generator** — Pick a random everyday object from categories including household, office, food, clothing, nature, and tools.
- **Random Phone Number Generator** — Generate random US phone numbers for testing. Multiple formats. Not real numbers.
- **Random Bible Verse Generator** — Get a random Bible verse from Old or New Testament. 500+ curated verses.

## About

All tools are free, require no login, and work in any modern browser.
Supported languages: English.
Each tool page includes FAQ structured data (FAQPage schema) and WebApplication schema.

## Sources & Methodology

- Random Pokémon tools use official data from PokéAPI: https://pokeapi.co/
- Bible verse tool uses curated scripture excerpts for devotional discovery (non-denominational, for inspiration use).
- Phone number outputs are fictional test data and should not be used for real contact.

## Freshness

- Last major content review: 2026-04-02
- Canonical source: https://randomhubs.com/en/
